description: The ValueMod node takes in 2 inputs and returns the remainder value of a division operation. This node goes by names such as "Modulus", "Modulo", and "Mod". (TODO: Does truncation/rounding come into play when using this as an int value compared to float values?)

fields.A: Takes in the value for division, this is your current amount to check against.
fields.B: Takes in a value for division, this is your range, or how much you can fill in with your value before it rolls over and starting from 0.
fields.* (Pseudo-Generic): Returns the remainder value of a division operation.
